caption: The video shows a news broadcast with a consistent graphical layout across all frames. The screen is dominated by political imagery and text in Hindi. On the left side, there is a photograph of Nitish Kumar, labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार." In the center, a social media post from Akhilesh Yadav is displayed, featuring his profile picture and a block of text in Hindi. To the right, photos of Dr. Prem Kumar and Vijay Chaudhary are visible. The top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" next to the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. A red bar at the bottom of the screen displays the text "शशत्रघ्रण के बाद BJP अध्यक्ष जे. पी. नड्डा का बयान" and a timestamp of "10:05 PM." The visuals remain static throughout the sequence, with only the lower banner slightly cropping in the final frame, while the overall layout and content of the political report remain unchanged.
